name: tokenpak-claude-code
description: Corpus-aware context packing, skills, and safety hooks for tokenpak users. Adds five MCP tools, five workflow skills, and four protective hooks to Claude Code.
author: tokenpak

tokenpak_proxy_url.description: URL of the tokenpak proxy daemon (e.g. http://localhost:8766). Leave empty to run the plugin without the proxy — all MCP tools fall back to no-corpus mode.

vault_root.description: Absolute path to your tokenpak vault root (e.g. /home/user/vault). Required for corpus-aware MCP tools; omit to use no-corpus fallback mode.

enable_telemetry_hook.description: Write per-tool-call telemetry entries to ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/telemetry/YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl on every tool call. Default on; set false to disable.

enable_validation_hook.description: Run per-extension file validators after Edit/Write tool calls (post-edit-validation hook). Default off — enable only after confirming your validators run under 2 seconds on typical file sizes.

license_key.description: tokenpak Pro license key. Activates Pro-tier skills, hooks, and subagents at install time. Stored in the system keychain — never written to settings.json in plaintext.
